steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The claim says Patty tried hard to convince Mrs. Trent to let the group keep sharing a room. The best quotation must show Patty making a deliberate persuasive effort.

steps.title: Select persuasive evidence
steps.content: The quotation about Patty using all the diplomacy at her command and appealing to friendship and sorrow directly shows that effort. A focuses on Mrs. Trent's reaction, B shows dismissal after the meeting, and C shows Patty acting elsewhere. The answer is D.
